urlInput.placeholder: Paste video URL here (supports multiple lines)

downloading.title: Downloading
downloading.emptyHint: Paste a video link to start downloading

network.testUnreachable: Proxy server unreachable, check host and port
network.testAuthFailed: Proxy authentication failed, check username and password
network.testTimeout: Connection timed out, proxy server not responding
network.testRefused: Connection refused, make sure the proxy server is running
network.systemProxyHint: System proxy settings will be used. yt-dlp automatically reads system proxy configuration (HTTP_PROXY / HTTPS_PROXY environment variables).

cookie.hint: Some sites (like Bilibili, YouTube) require login cookies to parse and download videos. Select your browser and click "Export Cookie" to get started.
cookie.bilibiliHint: If you get HTTP 412 error on Bilibili, enable Cookie and make sure you're logged in to Bilibili in your browser.
cookie.modeDesc: Choose how to provide website login credentials
cookie.browserDesc: Select the browser where you're logged in
cookie.browserReadyHint: Cookies will be automatically read from the selected browser during parsing and downloading
cookie.exportDesc: Export cookies from your browser to a local file. This file will be used automatically for parsing and downloading (recommended, avoids DPAPI errors).
cookie.exportSuccess: Cookie exported successfully! You can now parse and download normally.
cookie.fileExpired: Cookie file is expired (>24h), recommend re-exporting
cookie.dpapiHint: Tip: On Windows, reading browser cookies directly may fail due to DPAPI encryption. Click "Export Cookie" to extract cookies to a file first, which completely bypasses this issue. Please close the browser before exporting.
cookie.browserRunning: {{browser}} browser is still running! Please close it before exporting cookies.
cookie.dpapiError: DPAPI decryption failed. This is a known issue on Windows.
cookie.dpapiSolution1: 1. Make sure the browser is fully closed (including background processes)
cookie.dpapiSolution2: 2. Try switching to Firefox (not affected by DPAPI)
cookie.dpapiSolution3: 3. Use the "Get cookies.txt" browser extension to export manually
cookie.importDesc: If auto-export fails, use a browser extension to export cookies.txt and import it here
cookie.importInvalidFormat: Invalid file format. Please ensure it's a Netscape format cookies.txt
cookie.emptyCookies: Exported cookie file is empty. Make sure you're logged into the target website in your browser.
cookie.extensionHint: Recommended: Install the "Get cookies.txt LOCALLY" extension in your browser, visit the target site, then export the cookie file
cookie.manualInputDesc: Select a site and paste the cookie value from your browser. Open DevTools (F12) → Application → Cookies, then copy the cookie content.
cookie.selectSitePlaceholder: Choose the site to add cookies for
cookie.cookieValuePlaceholder:
Paste cookie value here...

Open DevTools (F12) in your browser
→ Application → Cookies → Select the site
→ Copy all cookies (format: key=value; key2=value2)
cookie.noValidCookies: No valid cookie entries found, please check the format
cookie.customDomainInvalid: Invalid domain format. Please enter a domain like example.com
cookie.bilibili412: Anti-bot protection, login required to avoid HTTP 412
cookie.youtubeAge: Age-restricted or premium content requires login

engine.autoUpdateDesc: Automatically check and update yt-dlp to the latest version on startup
engine.invalidBinary: Invalid binary file, please select the correct executable
engine.hint: yt-dlp is the core video extraction engine, FFmpeg handles video transcoding and merging. It's recommended to keep auto-update enabled for best compatibility. Custom paths let you use self-compiled or specific versions.

shortcuts.inUseByOtherApp: This shortcut is in use by another application
shortcuts.needModifier: Please use at least one modifier key (Ctrl/Alt/Shift)
shortcuts.hint: Click on a shortcut to modify it. Supports Ctrl, Alt, Shift combos and function keys. Press Esc to cancel.
shortcuts.globalHint: Shortcuts marked as "Global" work even when the app is not focused. Other shortcuts only work within the app.

about.description: An open-source cross-platform video download app

confirm.deleteTaskMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this download task?
